title: phlox viridis subsp. compacta
intro: Phlox viridis subsp. compacta, also known as wood phlox, is a perennial herb that belongs to the phlox family. It is used in herbal medicine for its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antispasmodic properties. The plant has various health benefits, including reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and soothing skin irritations. Wood phlox can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, and is often used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments.
